violations.description: Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. The ceiling tiles in the kitchen are not cleanable or smooth. Missing baseboards in the bar area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Underneath the dish rack in the bar area needs to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
